Off Calendar Feb-24-2003 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Bruce C. Burge, Esq, represented Plaintiff, Devendra Patel and Defendants, Andre A. Hall and Cari Dennison appeared in pro per. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
